claims.summary: The 768D-to-8D projection uses a deterministic fixed legacy basis and normalized columns.
claims.disposition: Verified the current projection construction and stable basis identity.

claims.summary: Float accumulation, near-zero columns, or legacy generator structure could degrade projection fidelity.
claims.disposition: Verified current precision and basis-health receipts expose these risks without mutating production weights.

claims.summary: Basis health and repeated projection construction should prove finite live columns and deterministic output.
claims.disposition: Verified focused tests assert no dead dimensions, finite norms, stable hashes, and repeated deterministic output.

claims.summary: Entropy-gated vibrancy should use a smooth transition and remain bounded.
claims.disposition: Verified the complete feedback implementation uses C1 smoothstep onset and bounded ceilings with exact regression coverage.
